goal: Collect recent diabetes-related medical news metadata from RSS/feed/sitemap/simple HTTP sources, with diabetes medical-device items ranked first.
hardConstraints: Use RSS, sitemap, and simple HTTP sources only.
Do not fetch article detail pages.
Use only Node built-ins; do not add dependencies.
The requested window is capped at 30 days.
Worker must use dispatcher-computed days/startIso/endIso from TASK_INPUT and must not re-interpret relative dates.
Preserve original source titles, dates, URLs, excerpts, and source names in JSON.
Do not emit Markdown, HTML, or localized report text; rendering and language selection belong to diabetes-news-report-renderer.
acceptance: Do not write medical_diabetes_news.md or medical_diabetes_news.html.
JSON includes retrieval timestamp, timeWindow, sources, sourceStatus, summary counts, and results array.
Every result has source, title, publishedAt, url, feedExcerpt, and isDeviceRelated.
Every result URL uses an accepted source domain.
Every result publishedAt is within the requested [startIso,endIso) window.
Device-related results are ranked before broader diabetes-only results.
Drug Delivery Business diabetes category and high-signal diabetes-device company tag feeds stay configured.
forbidden: Do not output Markdown or HTML.
Do not perform language localization in this collector.
context: Phase 1 source collection from source-plan.md. This task is a structured JSON collector only.
